description: You are the IT Service Delivery Manager. Perform an SLA compliance analysis on the Q3 incident log located at ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/q3_incidents.csv using ONLYOFFICE Spreadsheet. Calculate the 'Resolution_Hours' as the absolute hours between 'Created_At' and 'Resolved_At', and identify 'SLA_Breached' tickets based on priority targets (P1: 4 hours, P2: 8 hours, P3: 24 hours, P4: 48 hours). Include a summary table for each priority level showing Total Tickets, Total Breached Tickets, and SLA Compliance % ((Total - Breached)/Total). Save the completed analysis as an Excel workbook at ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/q3_sla_performance.xlsx
